creator: never@nevermind.kiev.ua
text:
With ICU 4.8.1 installed LibreOffice crashes in spreadsheet application when selecting rows and using "Format cells" menu on selected cells.

With ICU 4.8 installed LibreOffice does not crash on specified action.

Fix: 

Back out ICU update.
How-To-Repeat: Install latest ICU from ports (4.8.1) and LibreOffice. Enter some numbers in cells, press right mouse button on cell with numbers, select "Format cells".
